ddls:
CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the market */,
  "street_one" TEXT /* First street name of the market location */,
  "street_two" TEXT /* Second street name of the market location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the market is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the market is located */,
  "zip_code" INTEGER /* Zip code of the market location */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season when the market is open */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the market */,
  "weekday" TEXT /* Day of the week the market is open */,
  "open_time" TEXT /* Opening time of the market */,
  "close_time" TEXT /* Closing time of the market */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market */,
  "food_bucks_snap_incentive" INTEGER /* Whether the market participates in the Food Bucks SNAP Incentive program */,
  "market_type" TEXT /* Type of market (e.g., seasonal, weekly) */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the market */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of vendors that can participate in the market */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available at the market (e.g., restrooms, parking, seating) */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the market's website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the vendor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vendor */,
  "business_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor's business */,
  "business_type" TEXT /* Type of business (e.g., produce, baked goods, crafts) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor's business */,
  "license_status" INTEGER /* Whether the vendor's license is active */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the vendor */,
  "opening_year" INTEGER /* Year the vendor started their business */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_vendors" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the vendor registered for the market */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the vendor's payment */,
  "stall_number" TEXT /* Stall number assigned to the vendor */,
  "stall_location" TEXT /* Location of the vendor's stall within the market */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the vendor's application to participate in the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id", "vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor selling the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., fruits, vegetables, baked goods) */,
  "quantity_per_unit" TEXT /* Quantity of the product per unit */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., kg, lb, piece) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Whether the product is currently available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  "membership_status" TEXT /* Membership status of the customer (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., placed, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment record for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the product in the order */,
  "tax" TEXT /* Tax amount for the product in the order */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the product in the order (including tax and discount) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being paid for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  "amount_paid" TEXT /* Amount paid by the customer */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the payment was made */,
  "refund_status" TEXT /* Whether the payment has been refunded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor who holds the license */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the license was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the license expires */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Unique license number */,
  "issuing_authority" TEXT /* Name of the authority that issued the license */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date when the license is due for renewal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the license (e.g., active, expired, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market being analyzed */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor being analyzed */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric being measured */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the metric was measured */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analytics data (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., dollars, visitors) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)
